## Description

Briefly describe what changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] New feature

## Checks before merge

- [ ] PR targets `main` (or the branch indicated)
- [ ] Tests / linters pass
- [ ] Approval from `CODEOWNERS` (repository owner)

Notes: Direct pushes to protected branches are disabled; open a PR from your fork.
